role: Foundational type definitions and configuration schema for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Provides the core data contracts, configuration interfaces, and versioning constants that establish the data model and public API contract for the entire ArchSpine infrastructure layer, including a stable protocol facade for importing types and specialized type definitions for view artifacts such as architecture diagrams and risk hotspot items.

children.role: Defines the core data contracts and configuration schema for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Public protocol facade module providing a stable entry point for importing all ArchSpine protocol types.
Type definition module establishing the contract for view artifacts in the ArchSpine view generation system.
